customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, cooperative tone throughout. No scam skepticism, no bill resistance, no emotional volatility. His one channel preference signal (asked about online option before accepting in-person) is the only friction indicator.

Prior designs not asked: Carter never asked whether Zoltan has seen a solar design for this home (codex verify.prior_designs). Closer does not know whether Zoltan has existing quotes or competitive context.

Channel preference: Zoltan asked whether the appointment could be done online before accepting in-person. Accepted-but-not-preferred channel — closer should acknowledge and confirm Zoltan is still comfortable with the format.

State incentives: Zoltan asked about Virginia/Georgia state incentives at 08:07. Carter deflected correctly but Zoltan's interest was genuine. Closer should be prepared to address current incentives for Georgia.

Townhouse ownership — Zoltan confirmed he owns his portion of the roof and has a separate meter, but the townhouse context may affect roof access and system sizing.
